title: Shells Town Under Morgan’s Fear
description: On pages 0–3, this part pushes the Shells Town conflict forward as Luffy challenges the fear surrounding Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: LUFFY! STOP! ARE YOU TRYING TO PICK A FIGHT WITH THE WHOLE MANY!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SCUM is scum... no matter WHO its father is!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: y-you M17me! you actually hit ME!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: NO ONE HAS EVER HIIT ME! NOT EVEN DADDY!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: DON'T RUN CRYING TO PAPA! FACE ME LIKE A MAN!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THEN I WISH I'D GIVEN HIM A FEW MORE WHACKS FOR YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You shouldn't be talking to that person!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: IF THEY THINK YOU'RE HIS FRIEND, THEY'LL KILL YOU, TOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BUT, MOMMY, HE'S A GOOD MAN. AND ZOLO, HE'S A GOOD--

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHAT ARE YOU SAYING!? YOU DIDN'T GO TO THE PARADE GROUND, DID YOU!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THEY WON'T LET YOU GET AWAY WITH THIS!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND CAPTAIN MORTAN HAS THE WHOLE MANY BEHIND HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, whatever. I need to talk to Zolo.

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
